steps.title: Make the verb agree
steps.content: The subject is Fans, a plural noun. The blank needs a present-tense verb form that agrees with that plural subject in the sentence about recognizing a voice.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: A uses a singular present-tense verb, B uses the singular auxiliary has, and D uses the singular auxiliary is. The base present-tense form agrees with the plural subject. The answer is C.
